# La Campagna

## Business Summary
La Campagna is an authentic Italian brasserie and bar group operating four neighbourhood restaurants across South West England. The brand combines the warmth of a traditional pub with the quality of an Italian brasserie — serving fresh, seasonal, regionally inspired Italian food every day. The tagline is "where nothing is too much trouble."

## Cuisine & Concept
- Authentic Italian regional fare: antipasti, risotto, pasta, wood-fired pizza, meat and fish mains, desserts
- All food cooked to order using fresh, seasonal ingredients
- À la carte plus set menus for every occasion
- Sunday Roast available every Sunday (£19, 12:00–16:00)
- 2-course set lunch from £20.50 (Monday–Friday)
- Takeaway available every day 12:00–21:00
- Full bar: Italian wines, cocktails, draught lagers, ciders and real ales

## Locations

### Paulton
- Address: Salisbury Rd, Paulton, Bristol BS39 7RJ
- Phone: 01761 418443
- Email: paulton@la-campagna.co.uk
- Hours: Mon–Fri Lunch 12:00–15:00, Dinner 17:00–22:00 | Sat 12:00–22:30 | Sun 12:00–21:00

### Upton Scudamore, Warminster
- Address: The Angel Inn, Upton Scudamore, Warminster BA12 0AG
- Phone: 01985 213 225
- Email: warminster@la-campagna.co.uk
- Hours: Mon–Fri Lunch 12:00–15:00, Dinner 17:00–22:00 | Sat 12:00–22:30 | Sun 12:00–21:00
- Note: 5 boutique B&B rooms available above the restaurant via The Angel Inn (theangelinn.co.uk)

### Stonehouse
- Address: 56 High St, Stonehouse GL10 2NA
- Phone: 01453 821599
- Email: stonehouse@la-campagna.co.uk
- Hours: Mon–Fri Lunch 12:00–15:00, Dinner 17:00–22:00 | Sat 12:00–22:30 | Sun 12:00–21:00
- Parking: Public car park 300ft away (GL10 2NG). £0.20/hr Mon–Sat 8am–5pm, free after 5pm and all day Sunday/Bank Holidays

### Chard
- Address: Buckland St Mary, Chard TA20 3JE
- Phone: 01460 234292
- Email: chard@la-campagna.co.uk
- Hours: Mon–Sat 12:00–22:00 | Sun 12:00–21:00

## Menus Available
À La Carte, Set Lunch, Dessert Menu, Party Menu, Children's Menu, Takeaway Menu, Wine List, Drinks List, Christmas Menu, Christmas Day Menu

## Gift Cards
La Campagna gift cards available — contact any restaurant directly to purchase.

## Careers
Recruiting energetic, bright and attentive front-of-house and kitchen staff. Send CV and covering letter to: f.doku@la-campagna.co.uk
